item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the requested N+1 route split in the first sentence, identifies the repeated prior pattern of adding pools/queues/lines for timeout, missing materials, compensation dispute, and supervisor escalation, and reframes the issue as a routing/intake model failure rather than lack of channels. It proposes consolidation through a unified exception intake with tags, clarified transfer-dispute rules, and cleanup of existing queue boundaries. It does not open a new transfer channel."}
